_comment: TrainsBenchBoundary — the permission BOUNDARY attached (via `cdk bootstrap --custom-permissions-boundary TrainsBenchBoundary`) to every IAM role the bench's CloudFormation creates: the EC2 instance role (SSM core + S3 bench-bucket RW) and the Lambda exec role CDK generates for auto_delete_objects. It CAPS what any such role can ever do, so a leaked deploy cred cannot mint an admin role. This is a ceiling, not a grant. Replace <BENCH_ACCOUNT_ID>.
